metadata.description: Open skills marketplace by Saifullah Panca — hosts the zone spec-driven development pipeline (v1 multi-file stable, v2 merged single-file). More plugins to come.

plugins.name: zone
plugins.description: Spec-driven development pipeline — /zone takes an idea from brief to shipped PR autonomously. Seven phases: brief, spec, plan, implement, review, test, ship.

plugins.name: zone-v2
plugins.description: Spec-driven development pipeline (single-file) — /zone-v2 is the merged successor to zone v1: all seven phases in one skill, Notion opt-in (--notion), state in .zone-v2/. Runs side by side with v1.
